entries.notes: Receipt-backed dispatch admission landed on main via #5514 and closed RS-07/#5327.
entries.title: RS-07 Add a receipt-backed contract preflight path for safe admission

entries.notes: A2 admission-class productization for #7209: PR-1 landed via #7225 and was repaired by #7228. Corpus-aware dispatch upgrades known rev-4 corpus issues under ARAGORA_CORPUS_AWARE_DISPATCH while dispatch contract gating exposes missing credential-envelope slices as blocked_auth_failure before preflight receipt execution.
entries.title: A2 Productize rev-4 admission-class failures

entries.notes: Largest single failure class on the rev-4 B0 corpus (7/28 ticks = 25%; production ledger holds 74 ticks of the dominant worker_outcome=blocked_auth_failure shape). Per the A2 plan (`docs/plans/2026-05-16-a2-admission-class-productization.md`), the canonical productization path is to wire the existing CredentialEnvelope (RS-05) helper into _run_preflight_worker so credential drift surfaces as a cheap pre-dispatch admission rejection instead of spawning a real worker process with real provider keys. This entry locks the failure class to that productization target. The benchmark fixture at `benchmarks/fixtures/swarm/terminal_truth/blocked_auth_failure.json` carries the 5 canonical shapes (3 synthetic + the dominant production shape `needs_human/blocked_auth_failure` + the preflight subprocess `provider_auth_required` shape) and the fixture-driven productization test at `tests/benchmarks/test_blocked_auth_failure_productization.py` keeps them honest.
entries.title: Productize blocked_auth_failure (B0 rev-4 largest failure class)

entries.notes: A2 PR-2 (#7248) landed credential-envelope corpus synthesis under ARAGORA_CREDENTIAL_ENVELOPE_PROBE. When dispatch contract gating exposes blocked_auth_failure on a flagged rev-4 corpus shape (e.g. exception_narrowing on #5789, #5790), the synthesizer returns a new CredentialEnvelope with corpus_admitted markers on missing slices and preserves complete slices verbatim, allowing preflight receipt execution to proceed without modifying CredentialEnvelope.from_environment(). Linked fixture lists the canonical admission-recovery scenarios. Complements PR-1 (#7225) admission_class_corpus_synthesis_v1 (corpus-aware dispatch for blocked_not_dispatch_bounded). Tracks #7209.
entries.title: A2 PR-2 productization fixture: credential-envelope corpus synthesis scenarios
